feed.title: SAP Community - SAP NetWeaver
feed.subtitle: SAP NetWeaver Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to install NetWeaver 7.5 on AWS
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Regarding installation of NetWeaver on AWS, is there any way to install it without using "AWS Launch Wizard for SAP"?  If there is, it would be very helpful if you could guide me on how to do.

Thanks and Regards,
Takuya Nezu

entry.title: setup windows cluster for SAP HA
entry.content:
I have problem when setting Windows cluster before installation SAP Netware 7.52. please help.

Could you please share cluster requirements/reparation for installing sap HA?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Upgrade : SAPKB70208
entry.content:
Hello

We use Rev-Trac to import transports between our different systems. Rev-Trac, with its OOPS tool, allows us to check the consistency of data and objects. We recently encountered a problem with OOPS, which was due to a difference in package support levels.


In our ECC System, we have: 4 systems for DEV, QUAL, PreProd and Un prod.
D10, Q10, U10 and P10
In 2011: the two systems U10 and P10 have been upgraded from SAPKB70207 (Basis Support Package 07 for 7.02 Imported on 14.06.2011 )
  to SAPKB70208 and then to 
SAPKB73101 (SAP_BASIS 731: SP 0001 Imported on 16.10.2012 )
the two Dev and Quality systems did not upgrade to SAPKB70208, they have been upgraded directly from SAPKB70207 to SAPKB73101 without going through SAPKB70208 .

Can SAPKB70208 be upgraded?

entry.title: GUI F4 help amodal
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

when calling the F4 help in control view (amodal), we cannot mark lines and rows in the resulting list (Ctrl Y, Ctrl C).

Netweaver SAP_BASIS    750    DIGITS
SAP GUI 8.00 64-bit patch level 8

 

Thank you for your help.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: ECATT for SU10 does not work in background processing
entry.content:
Dear all!

My ECATT for TCD SU10 runs in foreground without any troubles but by execution in a scheduled background job I get the error message "No batch input data for dynpro SAPMSSY0 0120".

Can someone tell me how I can solve?

Tx and regards,

Mario

entry.title: Note analyzer problem
entry.content:
Dear expert

I upload checked_system.xml via note analyzer, but something is wrong. It shows the message as below
Could you tell me what the root cause is ?

entry.title: SAP Data retrieval inconsistency
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

I recently encountered a discrepancy in data I retrieved with two methods on SAP Netweaver:
1) SE16 transaction and 2) RFC_READ_TABLE function

The RFC_READ_TABLE missed some of the rows which SE16 showed. There were no filters used, no truncation, and the data requested was just the BELNR column of the BSEG table. The same client was used to authorize the retrieval. Anyone knows what could be a cause as to why some rows are not extracted via RFC_READ_TABLE?

Thank you!

Niko

entry.title: Not possible to retrieve information about SAP Scripting usage from directly from SAP.
entry.content:
We want to get the list of users who are using SAP Scripts since it is enabled for all user it is not possible to identify the population users who are using the sap scripts in EP7 SAP system, provide us the solution to find it. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: secussl_read: SSL_read() failed
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

We are facing problem that SAP instance can not connect to webdispatcher  due to certificate issue, 

Refer to below log:

[Thr 140520558421760] Sun Nov 24 15:17:32:142 2024 [Thr 140520558421760] Server SSL_CTX 7fcd784a7500 pvflags=897 (TLSv1.2,TLSv1.1,TLSv1.0,BC) [Thr 140520558421760] secussl_read: SSL_read() failed (536875078/0x20001046) [Thr 140520558421760] =

entry.title: Saprouter denies https after some time
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a pretty straightforward saprouter config file.
P * * *
and some lines
P <ip> website.domain 443

It works just fine, BUT after a few days the router starts denying https access.
I looked at all logs, nothing restarted the router or renewed its access table.

If I commit: saprouter -n
It is fine again and it is working fine for a few days.

I installed the latest version, but the problem persists.

What could be the reason?

Thanks!
I.G.

entry.title: Remove button in SU10 without using Screen Personas
entry.content:
Hi,
Our team wants to remove the button for editing single user in tcode SU01.
They say that the only way to achieve this is to install Screen Personas add-on.
However, we in the Basis team are wondering if another solution exist, to avoid having to install an new add-on just to remove 1 button in SU10.
See attachment to view the relevant button.
 
Do you know of another solution for this?
Thanks.
 



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to get Email ID from Netweaver UME in MII
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are using SAP MII 15.1. For one page, we need to show user details including Email id. From this URL, - https://server:port/XMII/Illuminator?service=admin&mode=userattriblist&Group=<user name>, we are able to get details but not Email id. 

How to get Email id also from the UME thru url?

Thanks,

Senthil

entry.title: Using Adobe Services without JAVA
entry.content:
Hello - Below is our current ERP version. We are connecting SAP ERP ABAP system to SAP NetWeaver 7.3 JAVA system to perform ADS activities. 


But we are planning to retire the "NetWeaver 7.3 JAVA system" and wanted to know if there is any other way to use ADS functionality without connecting to JAVA system.


Please provide any direction. We couldn't find any SAP oss notes related to this.


Version:


EHP7 FOR SAP ERP 6.0  
SAP NETWEAVER    7.4


Thank you


PERSON_NAME Nade


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: DTP load performance issue relate to RSSTATMANREQMAP
entry.content:
Hi,

We are experiencing an performance issue when launching DTP and retrieving the DTP log.

When we tried to open the DTP log in the process chain or launch a DTP load, it took a long time doing sequential read on the RSSTATMANREQMAP table, which is the DTP status table. Sometimes it could take up to 10 minutes or more to open the DTP log.

We tried OSS note 2248351 to run

  • RSSTATMAN_DELETE_OLD_REQMDEL
  • RSBK_REORG_RSSTATMANREQMAP_DEL

    These didn't help.

    Just wonder is anyone experience this situation and any solution on that.

     Regards,

entry.title: Problems with SQL Server Statistics.
entry.content:
Dear experts.

We have some programs (Z) making high costing accesess to some tables, related with this, for some tables we create new statistics in a daily basis (MSEG, PRPS and so on..) the problem is that some days (not always) those programs degradate drastrically and we need to re-create statistics in order to recover normal performance.

The question we want to ask is that any of you have had this behaviour before and found (or know) any reason for it.

Could you please give us some hint about this (strange) issue?.

Hope you could help us.

entry.title: SAP BTP - Forms Service by Adobe and Forms Service by Adobe API free tier
entry.content:
Hi,

I create an instance for Forms Service by Adobe and Forms Service by Adobe API using Free plan.

I also add the roles ADSAdmin and TemplateStoreAdmin to my user.

I am now trying to access the configuration UI using the following links provided in the documentation, links:

https://<sudbomain>-ads.formsprocessing.cfapps.<region>.hana.ondemand.com/ui/customer/index.html
https://<sudbomain>-ads.formsprocessing.cfapps.<region>.hana.ondemand.com/adsrestapi/ui.html

For some reason it´s not possible to me to access it.

Can you help me with this issue?

Best Regards

Jose Pimenta

entry.title: UI Error VL02N using Sliptream Engine
entry.content:
There is a UI5 error when executing VL02N using the Slipstream Engine. When users navigate to the Detailed Data for Handling Unit screen, the error: "Rendering has been re-started too many times (21). Add URL parameter sap-ui-xx-debugRendering=true for a detailed analysis."

Please advise on corrective action.

entry.title: SAP CICD pileplie for SAP JAVA
entry.content:
We have plan to integrate GIT LAB with SAP PO (JAVA 7.5) system on Azure for CI/CD pipeline, please suggest note or SAP Standard document for the same.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: REFX Lease Liability Entry
entry.content:
Dear Team 

In REFX module for reduction in lease liability entries are getting posted in the system but against the expense GL , cost centre is not getting displayed. From configuration perspective need to know all the steps to get the cost center at the expense line item level.

Thanks

Viral Guruji

entry.title: System locked; license is invalid or expired
entry.content:
I have migrated a server from a SUSE server to a Red Hat server, and after the migration, i have installed a temporary license for testing purposes. The temporary license expired or became invalid. Now, when i attempt to install a permanent license, i am encountering the following error: 

System locked; license is invalid or expired.
